name: Jackie Vernon
blurb: Jackie Vernon, born Ralph Verrone, was an American comedian known as the King of Deadpan for his melancholy, sad-sack stage persona and dry delivery.
bio: Jackie Vernon, born Ralph Verrone, was an American comedian known as the King of Deadpan for his melancholy, sad-sack stage persona and dry delivery. His signature bit was an imaginary vacation slide show, narrated with a hand clicker and no actual slides, and he later voiced the title character in the Rankin-Bass television special Frosty the Snowman.

timeline.ev: Releases the album A Wet Bird Never Flies at Night
Voiced the title role in Frosty the Snowman

accolades: Hailed as The King of Deadpan
Voice of Frosty in the perennial Rankin-Bass Christmas specials

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: No embeddable official clips exist. Jackie Vernon (d.1987), 1950s-60s deadpan comic. Searched for an official 'Jackie Vernon - Topic' auto-generated album channel for 'A Wet Bird Never Flies at Night' (1964, Jubilee JGM-2052) and 'A Man and His Watermelon' — none exists on YouTube. All available footage is fan/archival re-uploads of vintage TV appearances on personal channels (verified via oembed: 0IdAa0CyYuQ = 'Anthony DiFlorio' personal channel; ryJPaU8VNQ4 = 'Laugh Tracks Legends of Comedy' fan compilation channel). No official/long-standing uploader found. Honest gap per brief.
flags.note: Only two strong embeddable clips exist for this 1960s deadpan comic; honest gap, not padded.
